requirements.summary: Configure frontend build settings and environment for production deployment
acceptanceCriteria: Application is configured for production environment
All canister settings are optimized for live deployment

file_operations.description: Update Vite configuration to optimize production builds with proper chunking strategy, minification settings, and asset optimization. Ensure environment variables are correctly handled for production canister IDs.
Create production environment file containing production canister IDs and Internet Identity configuration for mainnet deployment.

requirements.summary: Optimize and minify all frontend assets for production deployment
acceptanceCriteria: JavaScript bundles are minified and optimized
CSS is minified and purged of unused styles
Images and static assets are compressed
Source maps are generated for debugging

file_operations.description: Enable Tailwind CSS purge configuration to remove unused styles in production builds. Ensure content paths correctly match all component files for proper CSS tree-shaking.

Configure build.minify, build.sourcemap, and build.cssMinify options. Add imagetools or sharp plugin configuration for automatic image optimization of generated assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Review and optimize custom CSS, removing any unused styles or development-only utilities. Ensure theme variables are production-ready.

requirements.summary: Verify Internet Identity authentication flows work in production environment
acceptanceCriteria: Login functionality works with production Internet Identity service
Authentication state persists across page refreshes
No authentication errors in production console

file_operations.description: Update Internet Identity configuration to use production identity provider URL (https://identity.ic0.app). Ensure AuthClient options include proper maxTimeToLive and derivationOrigin for production deployment. Add error handling for production authentication edge cases.
Add production-specific error handling and user feedback for authentication failures. Ensure login/logout UI states are clear and functional in production environment.

requirements.summary: Update all external URLs and resource references to production-ready values
acceptanceCriteria: All API endpoints point to production backend
Social media links are correct and functional
No development/localhost references remain in code

file_operations.description: Update backend actor creation to use production canister IDs from environment variables. Remove any hardcoded localhost or development URLs. Ensure proper host configuration for mainnet.
Verify all social media links point to production URLs. Ensure caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking is correct and functional for production environment.
Review and update meta tags for production deployment including canonical URL, Open Graph tags, and any CDN references. Ensure no development-only scripts or references remain.
Review React Query configuration for production-appropriate caching, retry logic, and error handling. Ensure Internet Identity provider initialization uses production settings.
